Education

Loyola Marymount University

BS Applied Mathematics | Minor: Biochemistry

August 2015 - May 2019

  • Dean’s List, Trustee Scholar, and Honors Program.
  • Graduated Summa Cum Laude with highest GPA in discipline.

Professional Roles

Optum

Data Scientist

June 2019 - Present

  • Develop machine learning models in python to predict incidents and improve remediation when incidents do occur.
  • Utilize Docker, Jenkins, Kubernetes, and Openshift to deploy trained machine learning models.
  • Used Spark (specifically PySpark) to clean and create feature vectors from bank transaction and account activity logs and use these vectors with Spark’s MLlib to detect irregular account activity.
  • Contributed to and enhanced the code quality of a Cucumber smoke tests repo for 60+ APIs.
  • Prepped and presented a 60-minute talk on machine translation. The talk was first done for 50+ interns at a Technology Development Program event and then again for 60+ employees and executives at the company’s MinneAnalytics conference.

Data Science Intern

June 2018 - August 2018

  • Worked on a team of three individuals to design the structure of a relational database to organize and connect patient PHI files from a variety of sources.
  • Wrote python scripts to parse a large collection of incoming patient information files of various file formats into one final report.

Big Data Intern

June 2017 - August 2017

  • Used SQL and Microsoft Report Builder to compile data into informative SSRS reports.
  • Received training in the big data tools of Datameer and Hadoop.

Teaching Roles

Trilogy Education Services

University of Minnesota Data Boot Camp Teaching Assistant

August 2019 - March 2020

  • Helped teach a class of 40+ students, of various ages and experience levels, data science skills using Python, VBA, JavaScript, SQL, and other tools.
  • Provided on-site tech support to students to configure working environments needed for the class.
  • Created and maintained the class GitHub repository which held all of the course material.

Loyola Marymount University

Deep Learning Teaching Assistant

August 2018 - December 2018

  • Assisted students with understanding deep learning concepts; including convolutional and recurrent neural network architectures.
  • Helped students write/comprehend python code and use the PyTorch machine learning package.
  • Graded deliverables and provided constructive feedback to help students understand the material.

Honors Research and Exhibition Teaching Assistant

September 2017 - December 2017 & September 2018 - December 2018

  • Read and provided feedback on research proposals drafted by undergraduate students of all disciplines.
  • Assisted professor with evaluating the deliverables of over 60 students on a weekly basis.
  • As a previous student in the Introduction to Research Methods course, provided input to professor on how to better facilitate the class.

Calculus I, II, and III Tutor

January 2018 - December 2018

  • Held four hours of weekly in-person tutoring to assist undergraduate students with their calculus coursework
  • Clearly explained important calculus concepts to help students who needed additional guidance
  • Maintained records and worked closely with program coordinator to determine appropriate staffing of math tutors

Writing Associate

August 2016 - December 2016

  • Held individual and group writing conferences with students in freshman honors English literature class.
  • Facilitated engaging classroom discussion.
  • Assisted professor with daily tasks such as grading essays and quizzes.
